title: PPN 022: Procuring steel in government contracts
body: "This PPN replaces PPN 010. It reflects changes to the project appraisal and commercial policy landscape which have occurred since PPN 010 was published and clarifies the data requirements; as well as introducing new policy measures requiring in-scope organisation to a) consult UK Steel’s Digital Catalogue and b) consider if the national security exemption in paragraph 25 of Schedule 2 to the Procurement Act 2023 is relevant to their procurements. "
